items.title: Red notification for tropical cyclone BAVI-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 35.53 million .
items.content: From 01/07/2026 to 10/07/2026, a Hurricane/Typhoon > 74 mph (maximum wind speed of 287 km/h) BAVI-26 was active in NWPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: Guam, Northern Mariana Islands, Japan, Taiwan, China (vulnerability Medium). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 35.53 million .
